title: And the "local AI" pitch? Ask one question before you believe it.  Can it phone home?  Because if there's any pipeline letting your data tr…
summary:
And the "local AI" pitch? Ask one question before you believe it.

Can it phone home?

Because if there's any pipeline letting your data travel outward, local is just a word. A feeling of safety the engineering doesn't back up.

Software you can't audit isn't private. "We'd never misuse it" isn't a security model. Promises don't encrypt data. Architecture does.
raw_text:
And the "local AI" pitch? Ask one question before you believe it.

Can it phone home?

Because if there's any pipeline letting your data travel outward, local is just a word. A feeling of safety the engineering doesn't back up.

Software you can't audit isn't private. "We'd never misuse it" isn't a security model. Promises don't encrypt data. Architecture does.

Ian isn't simple, nor short-sighted. And Nick is clearly not infallible.
